title: Pneumatopteris ligulata
taxonomy: Pneumatopteris ligulata is classified within the family Dryopteridaceae, which belongs to the order Polypodiales. This plant is a member of the genus Pneumatopteris, a group of ferns native to tropical regions. Within the Polypodiales order, Pneumatopteris ligulata is part of a larger group of ferns that share similar characteristics. The classification of Pneumatopteris ligulata provides insight into its evolutionary relationships with other plants.
